entry.title: Re: ODPI e ORDR
entry.content: Did you check at item level, AFAIK should be RDR1 and DPI1, fields baseentry and baseline.

entry.title: Re: Publice cloud是否可以直接銷售出貨專案庫存(601+Q)
entry.content: 您好；

entry.title: Re: Need Basis Expert how to enable configure button on AL11 tcode
entry.content:
Hello,

4.0B is quite old. I do not really know whether there is the possibility available to configure own AL11 entries. Did you have a look into SU56 when trying it? Possibly the function for editing is deactivated because of a missing authorization. 

Also have a look whether table USER_DIR exists in your system (in newer systems this is where own configured AL11 entries are stored, I do not know if this table exists in rel. 4.0B). Usually this table is allowed for maintenance via SE16, but this requires an opened (system settings in SCC4 and SE03) system. 

Kind regards

Jan

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA 構築手順に関する質問
entry.content:
本件回答させて頂きます。

  • Learning Hubを契約し、学習なさってください。
  • SAP Test and Demo User, starter packageであれば、ほとんどのオンプレ製品をカバーしております（検証いただけます）。
  • https://support.sap.com/en/my-support/help-support-applications/license-key-help.htmlをご参考ください。

entry.title: Re: Transporting only changed/modified/created holidays and holiday calendars from development to qu
entry.content: Very useful, exactly the advice I needed. thanks!

entry.title: Re: SAP CLOUD ALM API & Integration: Tasks/User Stories/Defects to Azure DevOps Work Item
entry.content:
Hello Xavier,

first of all, thank you very much for this insightful blog post!

Is this integration bi-directional or only outbound from SAP CALM?

In case we would want a bi-directional integration, we would have to build something on our own, correct?

Thank you very much in advance!

BR
Claudius

entry.title: Re: Problem with Geo-coodinates colums
entry.content:
Your steps are correct.
1.- Create the Location field in a Dimension.
2.- Associate the Dimension to the Fact
3.- And in the Analytical Model select the association to the Dimension to publish its fields (including the Location).

I don't understand why you see two Location fields, you should only see one inside the Dimension ‘folder’. Try deleting the one that is out of the Dimension.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: P & ID tagging in equipment master
entry.content:
Hi,

I have same scenario, I have chemical factory as a client my requirement is below

F-Location▶️Main Equipment▶️Sub Equipment▶️Tag No▶️Instrument(Material)

1-NAGP▶️Boiler▶️Feed Pump▶️B601▶️Pressure Transmitter.

How should I design please give me suggestion.

I want to treat pressure transmitter as material.

entry.title: Re: Getting started - Send Events from SAP S/4HANA to SAP Event Mesh on Business Technology Platform
entry.content:
Hi @hobru 

Great blog, thanks 👍

In an on-prem multi environment architecture (S4-DEV, S4-QAS, S4-PRD) how would you setup the event mesh on SAP BTP? 

Currently we have a single BTP-Subaccount with multiple spaces. One space for each environment (dev, qas & prd) and one event mesh instance in evey space.

Now we face some issues with the naming of the name spaces. Seems like there is a restriction that a namespace can only exist one time in a subaccount? Therefore you would need to have the environment in the namespace, for example 

"namespace": "dev/az/hbr"
"namespace": "qas/az/hbr"
"namespace": "prd/az/hbr"

We did not find any hints for architecture design in the documentation and OSS Ticket is unanswered from SAP..

Therefore we are looking forward to any ideas from the community.

entry.title: Re: Moving from SAP Insights to Navigator
entry.content: Hi Volker, Thank you very much for your feedback. That means I always need the HUB for the graphical representation. Got it. Do you know if I am then always forced to use Intelligence as well? We are considering focussing on Insights and no longer using Intelligence. However, we don't want to do without the graphical representation of the process flows. Does Explorer work independently of Intelligence? Do you know that? I am still trying to understand how the individual tools are dependent on each other and how they interact.

entry.title: Re: Designing UI5 Apps as Business Solution for SAP Build Work Zone - Part 1
entry.content:
Thank you @js2. These are great questions, so here are the answers:

  • The templates in Fiori Tooling will be updated. But I can't provide any timelines for this.
  • Yes standalone approuter will be supported in this scenario as well, however it is not in focus of my blog and not released yet. In general the same patterns can be applied there but there will be an approuter module and an additional service instance needed. 
  • You create one content provider per business solution which contains a set of apps that belong together (see part 2 where multiple apps belong to one content provider). Part 3 will show how to split your project and still have it under one content provider.
  • Refreshing the content provider is no longer needed. When you redeploy the app-host the cache will be invalidated automatically. This pain point of the HTML5 content provider has been removed. With the new technology the old HTML5 content provider will become deprecated and not developed further.

entry.title: Re: Program variant has a value despite "save field without value" in ECC 6 EHP7
entry.content:
How "old" are those variants (which version) and were they created manually (by standard) or thru some FM (I didn't see such bug since 4.6c 😎)

  • No RSVARDOC_NEW so no RSVCHECK_NEW - Did you consider implementing the notes listed in 2952867 - Documentation about new tools (RSVCHECK_NEW, RSVARDOC_NEW) for report selection variants

Thank you very much!

Best regards, Peter

entry.title: Re: EWM warehouse task is not getting saved
entry.content: It is part of bin sorting. in transaction /scwm/sbst you can sort all bins for required activity as pick and putawary and int etc.

entry.title: FCV In Bank Accounts is Incorrect comparing to Trial Balance
entry.content:
Hello Dears 

My COCD Currency is EGP and bank Account Currency is USD 
for Example: i have 100 USD and each Dollar for 50 EGP so it should be 5000 EGP in My trial Balance under this Account 
It appears in Trial Balance and FBL3N with credit (-2500) And its Incorrect because i have debit 100 USD 

After A month it May 1 dollar = 52 EGP so how can make System Adjust the local and Trial Balance for that account once I changed the Rate? noting that i run FAGL_FCV For Gl Balances and nothing Changed in TB

Thanks In advance

entry.title: Re: General Display Name Opt out in Second Half of 2024
entry.content:
Hi @Melli90 ,

If not any name format is configured, we will generate default general display name according to according to message key COMMON_USER_DISPLAYNAME in company default locale, by default the message key is defined as a combination of first name, middle name and last name.

Thanks

Harvey

entry.title: Packaging Material not relevant for Billing S4Hana Cloud
entry.content:
In our SAP Public Cloud setup, we manage packing in Warehouse Management (WM) and add the packaging material as a line item to the outbound delivery after goods issue, which has been possible since the 2408 release. Our goal is to have the packaging material (item category HUPM) visible on the shipping form without making it billable. However, when I create the billing document, I encounter an error stating that item category HUPM can’t be billed.

I've implemented logic as per SAP Note 3248636 to make the packaging material non-billing relevant, but the error still appears when generating the billing document. Has anyone successfully resolved this issue, or could you recommend additional steps or settings to ensure HUPM items are excluded from billing?

Any insights would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: Re: ME_INFORECORD_MAINTAIN_MULTI to create inforecord wit...
entry.content: Check 3070467 - ME_INFORECORD_MAINTAIN_MULTI: Template for creating info record for sample to fill parameters

entry.title: Re: 物料凭证过账，如何自动勾选 打印输出控制
entry.content: 已按照您提供的方式处理成功，谢谢。

entry.title: Re: Moving from SAP Insights to Navigator
entry.content: The Process Explorer is free of charge. You don't need Process Intelligence. But you can use Process Intelligence also in conjunction with Process Insights data (the so-called Plug & Gain methodology) and would be able to make use of the visualization capabilities of Process Intelligence.

entry.title: Re: Concurrent Absences in Employee Central Time Management - H2 2021
entry.content:
Hi Priyanka,

Thanks a lot for this wonderful blog!

I have a requirement that consider a employee create a new Sick leave with the undetermined enddate with 99% sick. Now after a week, he recovered a bit and he should change the percentage from 99 to maybe 50%. And similarly after another week he recovered fully and that also has to be captured in the system.

So all these changes can be captured in a Single request?

Like:
1) New leave created from Nov1st to undetermined date with 99%
2) Same request modified from 99% to 50% on Nov8th, (i.e user was 99% sick from Nov1st to 7th, and from 8th He is 50% sick with undetermined date.)
3) Same request modified from 50% to 0% on Nov15th, and similarly i.e from Nov8th to Nov15th he was 50% sick, and on Nov 16th Sick Leave should be closed as it reaches zero.

All, this changes should be captured in a single request with multiple entries in the system. Also, we have external integration to track these changes, so it will be good how we can track the request, like whenever there is a change in a request, how we can check the nature of the request whether is it New or Changed or Modified or Closed something like that.

So is this kind of process allowed in SF, like Modifying the single leave request with multiple entries? Or is there any workaround for this case?

We have these kind of Sick Leave requirement for NLD country. Looking forward for you response!

thanks,
Vignesh

entry.title: Re: Need Basis Expert how to enable configure button on AL11 tcode

Dear SAP Community Team,

My name is Ahmed Hany, and I am an SAP HCM Consultant. I am reaching out to seek your assistance in obtaining free certification opportunities that can help me further my career and enhance my skills.

completed my learning journey in exploring the SAP SuccessFactors platform. My Universal ID is P2008441693, and I have already obtained a free certificate, which I have attached to this email for your reference.

I appreciate any guidance or support you can provide regarding available certification options.

Thank you for your help!

entry.title: Re: QS21 classifications
entry.content:
Greetings,

classification of characteristic (MIC) is used to classify the characteristics and doesn't affect QM processes. It is used for finding characteristic (MIC) which are grouped together in a class and described by additional values - class characteristics.

Data preparation steps:

  • create characteristics in CT04
  • create class of type 005 in CL02 and assign characteristics
  • create characteristic (MIC) in QS21 and assign classification class to it. Additionally describe the characteristics with values

Finding the characteristics for usage in inspection plan:

  • create or change inspection plan using QP01 or QP02
  • find master inspection characteristic (MIC) according to class 
  • assign master inspection characteristic (MIC) to an operation

Best regards, Matjaž.

entry.title: Re: AFO SAC Edition and Standard Edition installed simult...
entry.content: Hello William and thank you for your answer. Is it possible with standard edition to upload AFO workbook in SAC??

entry.title: Outgoing Check and Payment
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

Our client’s in Turkey, operational processes include an "Outgoing Checks Process," which is actively in use. The users aim to select the check numbers they have issued to proceed with payments.

Number ranges are created for outgoing checks related bank accounts in 'Manage Checkbook' app, as in the FCHI process.

App: Manage Checkbox

For payments related to an open invoice with an outgoing check, we previously used transaction code F-58 in on-premise systems. However, we were unable to locate a similar transaction code in the public cloud system. We are now attempting to manage the check process via the 'Receive Bill of Exchange' app.

Here, we selected *outgoing payment* and posting key 39, using 'W' as the Special G/L Indicator.

In the F-58 screens, when entering a check, the next check number is automatically populated by entering the check number defined in FCHI.

However, when entering from this screen, we are unable to determine the next check number. How should we execute this process?

Enter posting key 25 and save the transaction.

 

App: Manage Outgoing check

Through this application, the check number issued is matched with the payment document number; however, no clearing entry or similar posting is created.

We are manually entering checks through the FCH5 screen and processing the manual collection via the FCHR transaction code. According to the notes, these transaction codes are not available in the public cloud, and best practices in the public cloud do not provide a process guide for handling these steps. Could you provide support on how to manage outgoing check processes in the public cloud systems?
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance FIN (Finance)

Christian

entry.title: how to send a mail with subject longer than 50 characters SET_MESSAGE_SUBJECT CL_BCS
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to send an email with a subject longer than 50 characters. 

I you using this method SET_MESSAGE_SUBJECT of class CL_BCS but the parameter I_SUBJECT is 50 digit.

i tried also this but not working:

https://community.sap.com/t5/crm-and-cx-blogs-by-members/more-than-50-character-lengths-in-email-subject-with-class-cl-bcs/ba-p/13557089#:~:text=To%20extend%20the%20e%2Dmail,when%20creating%20the%20document%20reference.&text=i_subject%20%3D%20space%20%29

 

thank you

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere - Replication Flow (Delta Functionality)
entry.content:
Hi all,

couple of comments and remarks from my end regarding some of the topics that are discussed in the threads above.

  1. In the meanwhile certain changes can be done on a running replication flow without restarting the entire replication flow, e.g. adding or removing a data set (link). Additionally, we will soon support the same when changing the delta load interval without restaring the entire replication flow to enable more flexiblity for users.
    @BenedictV 

  2. The delta of a Replication Flow can currently not be scheduled, i.e. a Replication Flow  using load type initial+delta can currently not be incorporated in a task chain. This is in our backlog and in discussion when we can support that. At the moment you can only influence the delta via the "Delta Load Interval" parameter.
    @Lokesh_Kumar_Pothapola 

  3. For very larger data sets it could be beneficial to have a dedicated replication flow in case you want to achieve a desireable performance, but in general we would not see only 1 data set per replication flow in each case.

  4. You can run many replication flows in parallel and not just only two. The more replication flow run, the more impact on performance will occur depending on the data volume & number of available jobs that need to serve the different replication flows. But there is no physical limit how many replication flows can run in parallel.
    @albertosimeoni 
     

Let me know if you have additional questions and hapyp to help out 🙂 

Kind regards,

Daniel

entry.title: Future Trends für GTM – 10 Jahre Global Trade Management
entry.content:
Wir feiern als DSAG-Arbeitsgruppe (AG) Jubiläum. In den letzten zehn Jahren konnten wir in der AG Global Trade Management (GTM) so manches bewegen – denken wir nur einmal an die Möglichkeit der Bestands-Umbuchung.

Doch bei unserem nächsten Treffen am 21. November 2024 in Hamburg schauen wir nicht nur zurück, sondern wagen einen Blick in die Zukunft von GTM. Welche Anforderungen haben wir z.B. an die SAP KI mit Joule? Welche GTM-Prozesse könnte die genAI aus unserer Sicht unterstützen? Und wir bekommen einen exklusiven Einblick in einen ersten Prototyp der Monitor Trading Contract Item App – auch hier dürfen wir unser Feedback kundtun. Last but not least beschäftigen wir uns mit der zukunftsweisenden Frage, welche Auswertungsmöglichkeiten in Form von Queries in einer Fiori App für GTM nötig wären.

Auch unsere „Sprechstunde“ mit SAP kommt nicht zu kurz. Platz für einen konstruktiven Austausch unserer aktuellen Verbesserungsvorschläge ist wie immer gegeben.

Sind Sie mit dabei? Zur Anmeldung für DSAG-Mitglieder geht es hier: https://www.dsagnet.de/event/gtm-treffen   

Herzliche Grüße,

Peter Langner

Sprecher AG GTM

did you check whether the possibility for maintaining own entries actually exists in 4.0B?

Kind regards

Jan

entry.title: Re: Error while doing GR in EWM.
entry.content:
Helo,

The Goods Mvt Bin you assign while GR at Item level in /scwm/prdi that bin should be created with storage type that has storage type role (F-Door).

Because we can only Receive Goods at door.

#opentowork 

Thank you 

Siva sai teja chandu

309-205-2311

entry.title: how to find "Delete Additional" job in background job processing monitor
entry.content:
We update our PO system to NetWeaver750 SPS29 recently, according to KBA DIGITS, there is a new job "Delete Additional"  in background job processing monitor, but I couldn't find this in our system, please help to point how to find this job?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: how to find "Delete Additional" job in background job...
entry.content:
You can create the DeleteAdditional job by following the below:

  1. Navigate to NWA->SOA->Monitoring->Background Job Processing Monitor->Create Job.
  2. Create the Job name.
  3. From the drop list of Job Type, select Delete Additional.

For job configuration, please follow the SAP KBA: 3228985 - NF: DeleteAdditional job to decrease table space.

entry.title: Re: Getting started with SAP Field Logistics
entry.content:
HI 

 i have worked on custom built FL in one of the client need to have practice server ,

 

Can we activate the Business Function   FIELD_LOGISTICS_OP. to see the field logitics.

 

Thanks

Suresh

entry.title: Re: Program variant has a value despite "save field without value" in ECC 6 EHP7
entry.content: Difficult to say. The versions were "mistakenly" deleted years ago. The programs were created in 2007/2008, one in 2015 but maybe it was created by copying a 2007 program, along with copying its variant under a new name. In 2007/2008, the ABAP version was 7.0 (according to the version I see in the custom IDoc types). In my system, RSVARDOC_610 is SAPKA74023, it doesn't have the note https://me.sap.com/notes/2880704 (SAPKA74024) referred by 2952867. I'm not sure I want to install it just to see if it fixes the bug :-p.

entry.title: Compensation: Can Salary Range be displayed in annualized values
entry.content:
In a multi-national implementation, Base Salaries are defined with different frequencies.

Currently, Salary Range (payGuide) values on the Compensation worksheet are displayed based on the employee's units_per_year. Screen shot below shows Salary Range Values in Monthly amounts

This as opposed to the ranges that are displayed in EC:

TIA,

sandy

entry.title: Re: Need Basis Expert how to enable configure button on AL11 tcode
entry.content:
Hello,

no, I mean: is the option of maintaining own entries in AL11 there in this quite old release? Or was this feature introduced in later SAP releases? 

As I already wrote, in newer releases the table USER_DIR contains own configured entries for AL11. As this table does not exist in your release 4.0B, one can assume that the option of own entries also does not exist. 

Kind regards

Jan

entry.title: Re: Check Sub-ID:"FI_GL_GENERAL_FI_CO", return code = 4 . Warning, HOW to remove this Warn
entry.content: Message with Sub-ID FI_GI_GENERAL_FI_CO: 'CO and FI-GL postings are integrated by design in S/4HANA:Reconciliation posting/real-time integration CO-FI is obsolete.' is a general warning message to inform you about the CO FI-GL integration. It will be added to the log regardless of whether you perform actions in real-time integration or not. This message does not block the system conversion.

entry.title: Re: Apply Now for free SAP training program at ASUE
entry.content:
Dear participants,

Please the following free SAP University Alliances learning offerings and resourses:

 

  1. SAP Business Processes Open Lectures:
    1. Main page: https://events.sap.com/business-processes-open-lecture-2024/en/home
    2. Registration page: https://events.sap.com/business-processes-open-lecture-2024/en/registration.aspx
  1. SAP Business Builders (gamified intro to SAP Analytics Cloud): https://businessbuilders.hec.ca/
  2. SAP Student Zone: https://learning.sap.com/student-zone
  3. SAP Quick Start Guides: https://community.sap.com/t5/beginner-corner-blog-posts/quick-start-guides-on-sap-cloud-solutions-for-faculties-and-students/ba-p/13493557
  4. SAP University Alliances page at SAP Community: https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/university-alliances

Best regards,

Igor Belousov (SAP University Alliances)

entry.title: Re: SAP ILM : Blocking a partner does not work
entry.content:
Hi,

I active the check box OBJECT ASSIGNEMENT. Is that enough?

When I try to add a CHECKSUM to my ILM OBJECT, there are no tables in the dropdown list, so I can't add any entries in this configuration point.

entry.title: Re: How to replace the char values into numeric in my string?
entry.content:
DATA : offset TYPE i.
IF v_tel_number CA sy-abcde.
 DATA(length) = strlen( v_tel_number ).
  DO length TIMES.
  offset = sy-index - 1.
  IF sy-abcde CS v_tel_number+offset(1).
  REPLACE v_tel_number+offset(1) IN v_tel_number WITH ' '.
  CONDENSE v_tel_number.
  ENDIF.
 ENDDO.
ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: how to send a mail with subject longer than 50 charac...
entry.content:
Check the restrictions in 698087 - User-defined mail title without length restriction

Furthermore, the IP_SUBJECT parameter is of type STRING in my systems.

  • What's your version?
  • Where did you check the mail title (don't use SAP GUI)

entry.title: Re: SAP Disclosure Management Stack 2200

Regards

Peter

entry.title: Re: Difference between "Rebate Recipient" and "Customer" in Rebate Setting
entry.content: Hi Raja

entry.title: Re: Processing a Credit Memo dated Previous Year against...
entry.content:
Fixed Asset Credit Memo in SAP

A: Posting

T code: F-90

Debit the vendor with posting key 21 and enter the amount by which you have to adjust the APC. Credit the asset with posting key 75 and TType 105 (if the Credit Memo is in invoice year) Or TTpe 160 if Credit memo is in following year (from invoice year).

Note:

  1. If you post a Credit Memo within the open fiscal year, then system will itself adjust the deprecation

II.For the closed fiscal years, depreciation can only be corrected manually via ABMA.

 

 

 

B: Reports:

  • AW01N:

 

  • AR02:

I have same problem with adapt this app. Could u please advise me? How do u solve this problem?

entry.title: Re: Need Basis Expert how to enable configure button on AL11 tcode
entry.content:
Hi Jan,

Oh sorry for misunderstand your point earlier. actually I have tried to google and asking on 4.0B on the feature AL11 but I cant see any where forum said it have. Can i say that if USER_DIR table doesn't exist meaning it is not possible to get configure button in AL11 on 4.0B right?

this table yes i confirm don't have. so any ide that i can add parameter is it on rz10 i can do it? i also not very sure., i have read on other article but also not sure on that.

entry.title: Re: Difference between "Rebate Recipient" and "Customer" in Rebate Setting

entry.title: Re: Enrichment Framework in MDG
entry.content:
Hi @Mark63 ,

is there a possiblility to enrich not only a single entity? For example to update data for BP_CENTRL and AD_POSTAL in the same enrichment.

Currently i am planning to build a workaround via derivation to achieve it, but than the possible functionalities would be restricted.

Best Regards
Tim

entry.title: Re: Need Basis Expert how to enable configure button on AL11 tcode
entry.content:
Hello,

then I guess that this possibility actually does not exist in your release. I do not know whether adding entries in the instance profile via RZ10 leads to the wanted result, but you can try it. 

Kind regards

Jan

entry.title: Re: How to send SAP data to Advanced Event Mesh in 15 minutes, code-less
entry.content:
This has been very helpful, I was only getting key fields populated by /ASADEV/ACI_GEN_PDVIEW_EXTRACT as I had added other fields with "add custom field". But that adds the APPEND_FLAG=X which caused them to avoid being extracted.

I totally missed I was supposed to double-click a table name. Might be nice to have some more explicit buttons on the toolbar to make it more intuitive but OK, now I know this part of the UI.

 

What I am struggling with now, is Join Builder. I am in a position of wanting to specify constants in a join. I have "the old data model". ADRC has key fields ADDRNUMBER, DATE_FROM, NATION.
I want to do

FROM lfa1
INNER JOIN adrc
ON adrc~addrnumber = lfa1~adrnr
AND adrc~date_from = '00010101'
AND adrc~nation = ' '

Can I specify the constant values for DATE_FROM and NATION, to join it correctly?
DATE_FROM is arguably "something we could skip" but NATION is important, we have multiple address versions in use. Perhaps you will tell me to just restrict it with the WHERE?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Debugger scripting - my first real use
entry.content: @joachimrees1I just stumbled across this nice blog post, thanks for it. But to me it looks a bit odd that you commented on your own blog post with "... Thanks Joachim!". 😉

entry.title: How to register Vendor Subranges ?
entry.content:
In the Supplier role of the Business Partner Master, there is "Vendor Subranges" tab, but the New Entry button is inactive and cannot be registered. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to register Vendor Subranges ?
entry.content:
Refer below steps to enable the new entry button in the Vendor subranges tab :

  1. Go to Maintain Business partner app
  2. Open the BP
  3. Select the role as supplier 
  4. Navigate to vendor: general data tab
  5. check the "VSR relevant" flag and "plant relevant" flag in the additional general data
  6. Save your changes

entry.content: Hello Experts, Could you please advise on this. Thank you, kind regards Thangaraj Thomas

Rinku

entry.title: Change History for Total Comp shows Original Value of 0 for performancePercent and goalResultsPayout
entry.content:
Hi, 

In our Total Compensation Template, when we open Change history, the values for performancePercent and goalResultsPayoutAmountTotal have original values of zero, even though we have guidelines which sets a default value. These default values are considered as "current value."

Is this the expected behavior? We're seeing this both in our Production and Preview instances.

entry.title: SAP BW DTP dynamic filter multiple fields
entry.content:
Hello

is there a way to set the SAP BW DTP filter for multiple fields at once, or do i have to create for each field a routine?

entry.title: Download com.sap.it.api.mapping.* jar file
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to use com.sap.it.api.mapping.* in IntelliJ. However it results in an error due to missing JAR. Can someone help with resources from where I can download this?

Note : I have already imported the Script API and Generic API jar from https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/#cloudintegration

Best Regards

entry.title: Reconciliation Close Improvements
entry.content:
We have received a lot of feedback on the reconciliation close process. We know the current reconciliation close process has the following flaws, which make it difficult to use.

  1. The current period is by default open. In most cases, the closing activities for the previous period are done at the beginning of the current period. For example, now is September, but you are doing the closing for August. Thus, even though the working period is closed, one can still run matching in the current period, which affects the data in the previous periods.
  2. The lock is at the leading unit level. When a pair is closed, the involved two units are both locked. And all other pairs that involve one of the 2 units are all blocked for matching.
  3. The Reconciliation Close statements of previous periods get changed due to the matching run in the follow-up periods. The historic closed statements should keep unchanged.
  4. The current reconciliation close has no control over the ICMR elimination. No matter closed or not, elimination always reads the latest data from ICADOCM.

We are happy to announce that all above flaws are resolved in the coming releases CE2502 and PCE2025.

Period Initially Closed

By default, periods are initially open, and you need to manually close them at the period end. This setup is convenient if you don't want to block matching until you close the pairs in the current period. However, in most cases, you work for the previous period in the new period. You expect open for the previous period and close for the current period. You can achieve this by checking the "Period Initially Closed" for the reconciliation case that is closed-activated(ICAARC).

Now, when you open the app Manage Reconciliation Close and check the recon case in the new period, you will see the "Reconciliation Close Status" column shows "Initially Closed" and you need to click the button "Open Period" to open all the pairs in the period. If you don't do that, you can still run matching jobs successfully in the period 2024010. However, the matching job only rolls in the new items without generating any assignments. Neither can you manually assign or unassign in the app Manage Assignments.

Lock on Pair Level

Before CE2502 or PCE2025, when a pair is closed, all other pairs that have either the leading or the partner unit will be locked for matching. For example, during a matching run, units A, B, and C are involved. If pair A->B is closed, then B->A, A->C, C->A, C->B, and B->C are all locked against matching.

In CE2502 or PCE2025, when a pair is closed, it only locks the pair; all other pairs are not affected. For example, if pair A->B is closed, then B->A, A->C, C->A, C->B, and B->C are still allowed to match. However, locked against matching doesn't block the data roll-in. New data still gets roll-in to ICADOCM with status "01 Roll-In".

If you run a matching job with some pairs closed and some pairs open, then you will get an application log like below. Bearing in mind that items belong to the locked pairs are not assigned even if they hit certain matching rules.

Snapshot Reconciliation Statement

The reconciliation close statements of previous periods get changed by matching runs in the follow-up periods due to the following reasons:

  1. Journal entries could be posted to the previous posting periods. Thus, the entries are lately rolled in after their posting periods were closed.
  2. Each matching run could un-assign and re-assign assignments that are tagged with the temporary reason codes. Which means reason codes could be changed for certain items, thus affecting the reconciliation statements.

The solution is to snapshot the reconciliation statements when the close action takes place. That is, when the user clicks the button "Close" for certain pairs, the calculated reconciliation statements will persist. The app Manage Reconciliation Close is enhanced to support snapshots.

In the first list view, you can Schedule Reconciliation Close Jobs. Of course, you can still select the pairs and then click the button "Close". However, if the number of pairs exceeds 50, then it will ask you to schedule a job instead. This is because each pair generates and persists a recon statement snapshot, which costs time. If you close more than 50 snapshots at a time in the front-end, it may cause the session timeout.

And you will see 2 amount columns: Difference at Latest Cutoff and Difference at Closing. Since after a pair is closed, new items can still be rolled in during a matching run, thus the amounts can still get changed. The first amount column stands for the latest cutoff amounts (each matching run generates a cutoff timestamp for a leading unit), while the second column stands for the amounts at last closing for the pair. If the 2 amounts are different, then it stands for new data roll-in after last closing, and thus a re-open activity should be considered. If you check the pair C1001 to C1000, you can find the "Reopen Recommended" is set to "Yes".

If you check the details of each pair's reconciliation statement, you can find more information. You can see each side 2 amounts, which are Closing Amount and Latest Amount, with the corresponding cutoff timestamps. Thus, the difference is calculated by adding the amounts from the two sides. You can find in the above picture that the partner's latest amount "-54,509.00EUR" is blue highlighted. This is because after the last closing cutoff, there were new items rolled in, thus changing the summarized amount. You can consider reopening the pair to count in the changes. Or you just leave it as is, then the affective reconciliation closing statement is version 1, as shown in the dropdown list at the upper right corner.

Imagine you run matching or upload to roll-in new items for a closed pair. Then, in the Current Reconciliation page, you will see the affections on the Latest Amounts, Difference at Latest Cutoff, and Unknown Reason category in the Reason Code Breakdown section. However, it doesn't affect the existing reason code breakdown amounts, nor the closing amounts and differences. And you can switch to the historic closing statement snapshots.

Reconciliation Close Control over Elimination

Before CE2502 or PCE2025, the reconciliation close had no control over the ICMR elimination. No matter closed or not, the ICMR elimination just reads what is in ICADOCM up to now. The only impact is that, once closed, data in ICADOCM is frozen. We found our customers somehow accept this, as they don't want too much intertwined between reconciliation close and elimination. They want elimination run without considering too much on reconciliation.

However, having reconciliation close control over elimination will provide the following benefits:

  1. Clear process control makes sure the data consistency and backtracking.
  2. The reconciliation statements go through approval and provide substantiation of the elimination differences.
  3. Elimination status can be monitored in the app Manage Reconciliation Close, which allows to run elimination for dedicate pairs to save time.

In CE2502 or PCE2025, we have made some changes that may not be well reflected on the UI. But I will try to give some elaboration.

Before closing the pairs, you can still run the elimination task (ID 2042). It will generate elimination differences with whatever in ICADOCM. So to say the elimination difference is not substantiated, but you can still get the preliminary elimination results.

Once you closed a pair of 2 consolidation units, there will be a cutoff timestamp recorded on each unit, and the elimination status will be set to "1 Outdated", which indicates the existing elimination result (if it has) may be outdated; a re-run of the elimination for this pair is needed. This time, the elimination run will take the 2 cutoff timestamps to filter in the data from ICADOCM. That is, only the matching items that are before the cutoff timestamp of each unit will be taken into elimination difference calculation.

Since after the pair gets closed, new assignment or un-assignment activity is blocked, therefore, the difference breakdown by reason code is frozen. Although the amounts in the "Unknown Reason" category may still get changed, due to the cutoff timestamp filtering, these changes will not be conveyed into the elimination.

Once the elimination run is finished, the status of the pair is set to "4 Completed". Then, for later elimination runs, this pair will be excluded unless you re-open the pair for any changes.

Now, you can check the elimination difference in the app Group Data Analysis. You will see almost the same differences breakdown by reason codes on the subitem "915", which stands for the transactional difference. And "980" stands for the currency conversion difference; "981" stands for the other difference. It substantiates the elimination differences and makes the data backtracking possible.

Conclusion

We have received a lot of feedback on ICMR. The requirements on reconciliation close are most prominent. We hope the above improvements can clear some obstacles in using the closing features. We will keep listening to your voice from all the channels. We'd appreciate it if you could give more valuable feedback. Together, we can make the product better.

Further Reading

  • The main documentation: https://help.sap.com/s4_ce_icmr and https://help.sap.com/s4_op_icmr
  • Introduction Video: Youtube.
  • FAQ: SAP Note for Cloud(2815332) and OP(2815304).
  • Configuration Guide: https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2916087

entry.title: Error CVIS_UI_GENERIC 011 while creating a BP
entry.content:
Hello,

I am working on a S4H public cloud and I am getting the error CVIS_UI_GENERIC 011 "contact person is a required entry field" while creating the BP in the role "Customer". Why am I getting this error? How can I avoid it?

Thanks and regards

entry.title: Re: Does Flexible Search support for "Select TOP" or Limit?
entry.content:
I prepared groovy script to fetch the records based on starting and total count :-
 
import de.hybris.platform.servicelayer.search.FlexibleSearchService
import de.hybris.platform.servicelayer.search.SearchResult
import com.saintgobain.core.model.MaterialModel
import de.hybris.platform.servicelayer.search.FlexibleSearchQuery
import de.hybris.platform.core.model.product.ProductModel
 
modelService = spring.getBean("modelService")
 
final Map<String, Object> params = new HashMap<String, Object>();
params.put("catalogVersion", "Online");
//Get Products only from Online version
final String query = "SELECT {m.pk} FROM {Product as m JOIN Catalogversion as cv ON {cv.pk}={m.catalogversion} JOIN CategoryProductRelation as rel ON {m:PK} = {rel:target} JOIN Category AS c ON {rel:source} = {c:PK}} WHERE {cv.version}=?catalogVersion"
FlexibleSearchService fss = spring.getBean("flexibleSearchService");
final FlexibleSearchQuery flexibleSearchQuery = new FlexibleSearchQuery(query, params);
//set the starting index
flexibleSearchQuery.setStart(0);
//set the number of records you want to retrive
flexibleSearchQuery.setCount(20)
final SearchResult<ProductModel> searchResult = fss.search(flexibleSearchQuery);
println "Total Products count: "+ searchResult.getTotalCount()
 
for (int rownum = 0; rownum < searchResult.getTotalCount(); rownum++) {
println "Product Code : "+ searchResult.getResult().get(rownum).getCode()
}

entry.title: How to synch data from PA30/PA20 actions of user group to SU01 of BASIS Tcode
entry.content:
I am writing to request your assistance in synchronizing user transfer and resignation data between the Personnel Administration (PA20/PA30) and User Management (SU01) transactions within our SAP system. This synchronization will help us streamline the process of distinguishing and managing SAP users based on their respective organizational sites and departments.

Currently, as part of our user management process, we rely on data maintained in PA20/PA30 to track employee transfers, resignations, and other HR-related changes. However, this information does not automatically reflect in SU01, which is crucial for managing SAP access and ensuring that users are properly aligned with their current roles, locations, and organizational structures.

entry.title: Re: Change History for Total Comp shows Original Value of 0 for performancePercent and goalResultsPa
entry.content: The behavior you're observing, where the original values for performancePercent and goalResultsPayoutAmountTotal are showing as zero in the Change history despite having guidelines that set default values, does seem unusual. Generally, the original values should reflect the default values set by your guidelines, not zero. This could be due to how the system is logging the initial values at the time of creation versus applying the guidelines. I recommend reaching out to your technical support team or vendor for clarification. They might be able to provide insights into whether this behavior is expected or if there is a configuration issue that needs to be addressed.

entry.title: Re: SAP Disclosure Management Stack 2200
entry.content: So you need an 'insider' such as @Marc_Kuipers

entry.title: Re: Round off Values in SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hi,

You can use formatNumber. Just put .00 in Number Format and you are good to go.

entry.title: System check for Orphaned Client Dependent Data
entry.content:
2618018 - S4TWL - Generic Check for SAP S/4HANA Conversion and Upgrade

 

on this for the below task
Check for orphaned client dependent data

 

1.We have not performed any client deletion on the recent past but need to know how to check the status of any abrupt/stopped Client deletion status at SAP level 
2.Also how to check if any orphaned client dependent data in DB level
3.Also what is impact of this action item "Check for orphaned client dependent data"
It has actioned before conversion ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: 2H 2024- LRN-152446 Custom card section location is a...
entry.content: Thank You for responding. Waiting for customer reply to this solution

entry.title: Re: Customized fields at Case management of FSCM
entry.content:
@Shouvick 

Not recommend you change the label for this field SCMG_T_CASE_ATTR-PROCESSOR as it's standard 🙂 maybe you can do this:

  1. Create one Customized field with your new label;
  2. Change the screen layout at the selection screen profile, hide the standard one and show your customized one.

entry.title: Re: System check for Orphaned Client Dependent Data
entry.content:
Hello,

The result of the mentioned check should give you information about the topics covered in your questions. Also, yes, the check should be performed before the conversion.

As mentioned in SAP Note 2399707 - Simplification Item Check

"To learn more about how to perform simplification item checks and the relation to SAP Readiness Check, you can explore the following links:

https://blogs.sap.com/2018/03/26/sap-s4hana-simplification-item-check-how-to-do-it-right./

https://blogs.sap.com/2020/01/02/simplification-item-catalog-simplification-item-check-and-sap-readiness-check-for-sap-s-4hana/ "

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Apache spark dataframe jdbc write- how to use table_type= COLUMN during writing dataframe using
entry.content: Hello, I'm facing the same issue, were you able to solve this?

entry.title: Re: SAW 17: Question on JSON parsing (dbo.sp_parse_json p...
entry.content:
In our experience the only way to do this is by using exception handling.

sp_parse_json work for basic scenarios, but as soon as there is any chance of there being variables within the structure we have found it is best to parse with an external procedure

entry.title: SO automatically to PO in S/4 HANA cloud
entry.content:
I would like to know how to create a sales order that automatically converts to a purchase order.

And also, is there any way to automatically convert the purchase requisition to a purchase order?

entry.title: Ex ness パートナーコード [ ht0sopiioj ]BONUS up to 90% signup 2024
entry.content:
Ex ness パートナーコード [ ht0sopiioj ] ボーナス最大 90 % サインアップ 2024。 新規アカウント登録時に Ex ness パートナーコード [ ht0sopiioj ] を使用する理由。 Ex ness で取引アカウントを開設する予定の場合、パートナーコードを使用すると、さまざまな独占特典が解除され、オンライン取引の競争の激しい世界で優位に立つことができます。そのような Ex ness パートナーコード無料 1 つは [ ht0sopiioj ] です。この記事では、Ex ness でパートナーコードを追加する方法、その利点、および新規アカウントにサインアップするときにそれを使用することを検討する必要がある理由について説明します。 独占ボーナスとプロモーション Ex ness パートナーコード無料 [ ht0sopiioj ] を使用する主な利点は、独占ボーナスとプロモーションにアクセスできることです。Ex ness は、パートナーコードを使用してサインアップするトレーダーに頻繁に特別ボーナスを提供しています。これには、入金ボーナス、スプレッドの削減、および初期取引資本を最大限に活用するのに役立つその他のインセンティブが含まれます。 Ex ness パートナー コードを無料で使用することで、最初から取引の可能性を高め、より収益性の高いスタートを切るのに役立つオファーにアクセスできます。 専用サポートと支援 Ex ness パートナー コードを無料で使用すると、パーソナライズされたサポートも受けられます。多くの場合、Ex ness パートナー コードでは、取引のニーズと好みを理解している専任のアカウント マネージャーまたは専門のサポート チームにリンクされます。このカスタマイズされたサポートは、特にプラットフォームのナビゲーションや戦略開発のサポートが必要な初心者にとって非常に貴重です。専用サポートがあれば、よりスムーズで効率的な取引体験が得られ、取引の旅で孤独を感じることがなくなります。 独占取引ツールへのアクセス Ex ness パートナー コード [ ht0sopiioj ] を使用するもう 1 つの大きな理由は、独占取引ツールにアクセスできる可能性があることです。Ex ness は、トレーダーが戦略を洗練し、市場のトレン

 

改善された取引条件 新規トレーダーの主な懸念事項の 1 つは、スプレッド、手数料、その他の料金を含む取引コストです。Ex ness パートナー コード無料 [ ht0sopiioj ] に登録すると、スプレッドの低減や料金の削減など、より有利な取引条件の恩恵を受けることができます。これらの改善された条件により、各取引のコストを最小限に抑えながら利益を最大化できます。これは、取引を始めたばかりで、高い取引コストを心配することなく、すべての取引を最大限に活用したい場合に特に重要です。 強化された信頼性とセキュリティ Ex ness は、厳格なセキュリティ対策で知られる、信頼され規制されたブローカーです。Ex ness パートナー コード無料 [ ht0sopiioj ] を使用してサインアップすると、資金と個人情報が安全であることを保証する評判の良いネットワークに接続します。 Ex ness はトレーダーを保護するために高度なセキュリティ プロトコルを実装しているため、データ漏洩や詐欺を心配することなく、トレーディング戦略に集中できます。検証済みのパートナー コードを使用すると、業界のベスト プラクティスに従うプロフェッショナルと連携していることが保証されます。 成功したトレーダーのコミュニティに参加する Ex ness パートナー コード無料 [ ht0sopiioj ] にサインアップすると、貴重なツールやサポートにアクセスできるだけでなく、成功したトレーダーの活気あるコミュニティの一員にもなります。多くの Ex ness パートナーは、トレーダーが洞察、戦略、ヒントを共有できるプライベート トレーディング グループまたはフォーラムへの独占アクセスを提供しています。トレーディングの初心者でも経験豊富なトレーダーでも、このようなコミュニティの一員になることで学習が加速し、トレーディングの旅のモチベーションを維持できます。 紹介報酬と利益分配 直接的なメリットに加えて、Ex ness パートナー コード無料 [ ht0sopiioj ] にサインアップすると、紹介報酬への扉が開かれることもあります。 Ex ness には、新規トレーダーを紹介したパートナーに報酬を与える利益分配プログラムがあります。経験豊富なトレーダーにとって、これは知識を他の人と共有しながら追加

 

Ex ness パートナー コードの特典で可能性を最大限に引き出す 上記のすべての特定の特典に加えて、Ex ness パートナー コード [ ht0sopiioj ] を使用すると、トレーディングの可能性を大幅に高めることができる貴重な機会の組み合わせが解放されます。パーソナライズされたガイダンスの受信、より良いトレーディング条件の享受、高度なツールへのアクセス、トレーディング コミュニティのサポートなど、Ex ness パートナー コードの特典は、包括的な利点を提供するように設計されています。これらの複合特典は、トレーディング エクスペリエンスとポジションを向上させるための総合的なアプローチを提供します。

entry.title: Re: Enrichment Framework in MDG
entry.content:
In the meantime, there are more features related to mass enrichment. Please check the MDG User Assistance documentation in SAP Help Portal for Mass Processing and Data Provider Integration.

 

Best, Markus
